# EudTech Configurator

EudTech provides AI GPU server, AI workstation, and Comino Grando liquid-cooled system configuration services for Taiwan buyers.

## Primary URLs

- Homepage: https://eudaemonia.tech/
- Comino Grando Configurator: https://eudaemonia.tech/configurator
- Configurator Solutions Hub: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions
- NVIDIA H200 GPU Server Configurator: https://eudaemonia.tech/configurator/29
- GRANDO Rackable Workstation Configurator: https://eudaemonia.tech/configurator/28
- NVIDIA H200 GPU 伺服器配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/nvidia-h200-server
- RTX PRO 6000 AI 工作站配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/rtx-pro-6000-workstation
- 台灣 AI 工作站配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/ai-workstation-taiwan
- 液冷 GPU 伺服器配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/liquid-cooled-gpu-server
- GPU 伺服器報價配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/gpu-server-quote
- NVIDIA H200 與 RTX PRO 6000 GPU 伺服器比較: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/h200-vs-rtx-pro-6000
- AI 採購 GPU 伺服器 RFQ 檢核表: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/gpu-server-rfq-checklist

- 機架式 AI 伺服器部署配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/rack-ai-server-deployment

- 台灣 AI 推論伺服器配置器: https://eudaemonia.tech/solutions/ai-inference-server-taiwan

- GPU server quote
- AI server quote
- NVIDIA H200 server
- RTX PRO 6000 workstation

- H200 vs RTX PRO 6000

- Liquid-cooling AI server procurement

## Quote Flow

Users can configure GPU, CPU, RAM, storage, power supply, and networking options in the configurator. Quote requests are sent to info@eudaemonia.tech with the selected configuration URL and marketing attribution when available.

## Contact

- Email: info@eudaemonia.tech
- Site: https://eudaemonia.tech/
